name: Istanbul Hawai'i
tagline: The only legit Turkish restaurant on Oahu — mezze platters, kebabs, and baklava in the heart of Kakaako's SALT complex.
mustOrder: mixed mezze platter — hummus, baba ganoush, stuffed grape leaves
Turkish tea or coffee to finish
parking: Free parking at SALT at Our Kakaako complex; street parking on Auahi St
bestTime: Dinner on the outdoor terrace. Weeknight dinners are relaxed; weekends get busy
talkStory: Istanbul Hawai'i fills a genuine cuisine gap on the island — there's nowhere else to get proper Turkish food on Oahu. Located in SALT at Our Kakaako, the restaurant serves traditional mezze, kebabs, pide (Turkish flatbread), and house-made baklava. The outdoor terrace is one of the nicer casual dining spots in Kakaako. Run by a Turkish family who imports spices directly. The mixed grill plate is enough for two. At 4.6 stars with nearly 2,000 reviews, it's earned its following purely on food quality in a neighborhood full of competition.
